data.title: The crypto market fell across the board, with OM’s flash crash causing the RWA sector to fall by 44.93%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 14, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market fell across the board. It is worth noting that due to the huge drop of 85.56% in OM, the native token of MANTRA, the RWA sector fell 44.93% in 24 hours. MANTRA officially responded that the decline was caused by "disorderly liquidation" rather than the project team. At the same time, the crypto sector index reflecting the historical market conditions of the sector showed that the ssiRWA index fell 48.90% in 24 hours.
In addition, Bitcoin (BTC) fell 1.41% in 24 hours, once falling below $84,000. Ethereum (ETH) fell 0.25%, but was still above $1,600.
In other sectors, the PayFi sector fell 1.12% in 24 hours, but Bitcoin Cash (BCH) and Litecoin (LTC) rose 6.18% and 2.12% respectively; the Layer1 sector fell 1.47%, and within the sector, TRON (TRX) rose 4.18% against the trend; the CeFi sector fell 1.65%, the Meme sector fell 1.82%, and Pepe (PEPE) performed strongly, rising 3.39% in 24 hours; the Layer2 sector fell 2.92%, and the DeFi sector fell 3.05%, but Uniswap (UNI) and Sky (SKY) rose 2.20% and 2.54% respectively.

data.title: Janover Inc. Increases Solana Holdings to $9.6 Million
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. listed company Janover Inc. announced on April 11 that it has acquired an additional 44,158 Solana (SOL) tokens, valued at approximately $5 million.

This purchase raises Janover's total Solana holdings to 83,084 tokens, with an estimated value of $9.6 million.

data.title: Three addresses withdrew more than 10,000 ETH from OKX, suspected to be operated by the same whale
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News l According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, in the past 8 hours, three addresses have withdrawn a total of 10,637.78 ETH from OKX, with a total value of approximately US$17.27 million, and an average opening price of US$1,623.
These three addresses deposited ETH into Aave and borrowed USDT after withdrawing coins in a similar time period. The operation paths are highly similar, and they are suspected to be the same whale or institutional address.

data.title: CoinW has launched RFC tokens and started a bounty campaign
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CoinW officially launched the Solana chain Meme token RFC (Retard Finder Coin) at 13:00 (UTC+8) on April 9, and opened the RFC/USDT trading pair, which is now available in the Meme and Sol areas of CoinW.
RFC was issued by the X account @ifindretards, which has accumulated 700,000 followers with its unique social commentary style and has attracted attention due to its many interactions with Elon Musk. To celebrate the launch of RFC, CoinW simultaneously launched the "RFC Bounty Program" with a total prize pool of 5,000 USDT. The event time is from 13:00 on April 9 to 00:00 on April 17.

data.title: Janover, a US listed company, increased its holdings of 44,158 SOLs, bringing its total holdings of SOLs to 83,084
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Janover Inc., a US listed company, announced on April 11 that it had purchased 44,158 Solana (SOL), worth approximately US$5 million. The purchase brings the total number of Solana held by Janover to 83,084, worth approximately US$9.6 million. The company will immediately begin staking its newly acquired SOL to generate revenue while supporting the Solana network. Previously, Janover's board of directors approved the company's new financial policy on April 4, 2025, authorizing the long-term accumulation of crypto assets starting with Solana.
It is reported that Janover is an artificial intelligence platform that connects the commercial real estate industry.

data.title: Florida Residents Warned of McAfee Pop-Up Scam
data.description: According to Foresight News, a scam involving fake McAfee pop-up alerts has been reported in Pinellas County, Florida. Criminals are using these alerts to gain remote access to victims' computers, persuading them to transfer funds through Bitcoin ATMs, purchase gold bars, or withdraw cash for transfers. One resident has reportedly lost over $530,000 due to this scheme. Authorities are advising the public to refrain from sharing personal information and to report any suspicious activities immediately.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sentiment Shifts to Fear as Index Drops
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index has decreased to 31, indicating a heightened sense of 'fear' in the market. This marks a significant drop from the previous day's index of 45. The Fear and Greed Index, which ranges from 0 to 100, is calculated based on several factors: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media activity (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's dominance in the market (10%), and Google search trends (10%).

data.title: BNB Surpasses 590 USDT with a Narrowed 0.60% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 14, 2025, 02:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 590 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 590.789978 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.60% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. eases tech tariffs, offering relief to Apple and semiconductor sector
data.description:
14-4-2025 – Washington has unveiled revised tariff guidelines, offering respite to the technology sector amidst widespread economic uncertainty. The modifications, announced on Friday, carve out crucial exemptions for an array of electronic devices, encompassing everything from mobile phones to semiconductor manufacturing equipment. data.title: Zoth attacker transfers 400 ETH to new address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Paidun monitoring, the address marked as the Zoth attacker has transferred 400 ETH (about 650,000 US dollars) to a new address.
